description_long: This shotgun features a compact, bullpup-style design with a matte black finish and angular, modern contours. The receiver and stock are integrated into a single, streamlined body, with the magazine located behind the pistol grip for a shortened overall length. The barrel is relatively short and features a vented muzzle brake at the front, while the top of the weapon has a flat rail section for potential optics or accessories. The trigger guard is large and angular, providing ample space for gloved fingers and a secure grip. The magazine is box-shaped and protrudes downward from the rear section, and the overall construction suggests a robust, tactical build suitable for urban environments. The surface appears hard and slightly matte, with minimal reflective qualities.
description: A compact, bullpup-style shotgun with a matte black finish, angular body, and a vented muzzle brake. It features a box magazine, large angular trigger guard, and a robust, tactical design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vented muzzle brake and the narrow, ribbed barrel profile.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bullpup configuration, box magazine, angular trigger guard, and integrated stock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid stock and the alignment of the receiver and magazine.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same bullpup layout, magazine, and angular features as view 1.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented muzzle brake and ribbing along the barrel
attribute_stock_type: full stock integrated into bullpup body
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, angular, elongated trigger guard with a squared profile and ample space
